CustomField.description: Displays remaining balance on the payment after deducting the 'Line Amount Unapplied' from the 'Payment Line Amount'. Used when multi-currency is enabled
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays remaining balance on the payment after deducting the 'Line Amount Unapplied' from the 'Payment Line Amount'. Used when multi-currency is enabled
CustomField.label: Applied Line Amount
